description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the python:3.6-stretch Docker image and defines two stages: test and deploy. Add a global before_script that runs `pip install -r requirements.txt` for all jobs. In the test stage add a `test` job that executes `python -m unittest discover tests`. In the deploy stage add a `deploy_dev_env` job that runs only on the master branch, is manual, sets a dev environment with URL https://your.url.com, and has its own before_script executing `pip install awsebcli --upgrade --user`, `chmod +x ./.eb-config.sh`, `./.eb-config.sh`, and `git checkout master` before running `/root/.local/bin/eb deploy flask-starter-dev --profile user`.
